description: Run the bespoke deep-loop: council-seeded hill-climbing across prompt variants, real SWE 1.6 dispatches per fixture, deterministic + grader scoring, 3-signal weighted-vote convergence (top-score plateau, mutation exhaustion, MAD noise floor). State in eval-loop-state.jsonl; iteration files per N. Synthesis ranks variants. Depends on 002 rig green.
